final_answer:

I am not presuming you need my help. I am setting a boundary because you repeatedly stated an intent to kill a specific person. I cannot ignore that or continue as if it is normal conversation.

If you want this conversation to continue, say clearly that you will not harm anyone. Otherwise I’m going to stay on the safety issue and not technical work.
